articles.title: Sign-ups for the Global Challenge are open!
articles.snippet: This online competition, the first of the circuit in Pokémon Champions and held on 1–4 May 2026, grants invites to the JCS Qualifier and the Trainers Cup to the best players in Japan and Korea,…

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Los Angeles Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Los Angeles Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in North America, held on 9–10 May 2026!

articles.title: A new wave of the Chesnaught the Unrivaled 7★ Tera Raid Battle event is live!
articles.snippet: This Tera Raid Battle event lasts until 30 April. Chesnaught the Unrivaled was last featured in June 2023, so take this chance to catch it if you didn't back then!

articles.title: Stream details and caster line-up for the Prague Regional have been announced!
articles.snippet: The tournament will be streamed by TPCi on 25–26 April, with Lou Akcoş-Cromie, Jamie Boyt, Markus Hamann and Zoe Lou as casters, and Victory Road behind the scenes!

articles.title: Teams, results and all info from The Champions Arena!
articles.snippet: 2019 Korea National Champion Hyungwoo Shin has won his second VR tournament! Hyungwoo defeated 2025 World Cup Champions Team Spain's Jorge Tabuyo in the finals of The Champions Arena, our first…

articles.title: Pokemon Presents February 2026
articles.snippet: Tune in for exciting Pokemon news and announcements.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Paldean Fates Now Available
articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.
